overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting exploration of a southern plantation estate. The camera follows the player character through manicured gardens, past a wooden outbuilding, and toward a gazebo as the weather transitions from sunny morning to a dramatic thunderstorm.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation house front garden with brick pathways

events.description: camera moves past the decorative flower urn revealing the plantation house porch and two characters conversing
the two characters finish talking and begin walking away from the house along the path

agents.ego_description: approaching the plantation house through the garden path, moving toward the two men standing on the porch

notable_agents.action: Arthur Morgan in blue coat and hat standing and gesturing while talking
man in tan coat standing with arms crossed listening, then walking alongside

entered.detail: large ornate stone planter with red flowers and green foliage
two-story wooden plantation house with white columns and ivy-covered porch
red brick herringbone pattern walkway leading to house entrance
tall narrow evergreen shrub flanking the path
tall narrow evergreen shrub flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a manicured garden with a large flower urn in the foreground. As the camera moves forward, the plantation house comes into view with two men conversing on the porch. The men begin walking along the brick path as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation house side walkway with ivy-covered columns

events.description: turning the corner of the house from the front garden to the side path
characters walk ahead and begin to move out of frame as camera continues along the house side

agents.ego_description: following the brick path along the side of the house, trailing behind the two men walking ahead

notable_agents.action: Arthur Morgan walking ahead along the brick path, moving away from camera

entered.detail: small gray wooden barn with shingled roof visible in the distance
painted wooden shutters on the side windows of the main house
stacked wooden barrels beside the house wall
white columns wrapped in climbing ivy vines

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the path along the side of the plantation house, passing green shutters and wooden barrels. The two men walk ahead toward a wooden outbuilding visible in the distance, while ivy-covered columns line the porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plantation grounds with outbuildings and fields

events.description: sky darkening significantly as storm clouds gather and weather begins to turn
moving from the structured garden area into open grassy fields with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open grounds around the property, exploring the landscape between the main house and outbuildings

entered.detail: wooden fence marking the boundary of the property
mature deciduous tree with spreading branches in the open field
dense line of trees marking the horizon beyond the fields

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into open grassy grounds, circling the wooden outbuilding. The sky darkens as a storm approaches, and the landscape opens up to reveal fields bordered by split-rail fences and a distant tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy garden with central gazebo shelter

events.description: storm arrives with dramatic darkening, rain begins falling, and lighting shifts to low contrast
approaching the white gazebo where people are sheltering from the rain

agents.ego_description: walking toward the gazebo through the rain, observing the people inside taking shelter from the storm

notable_agents.action: people sitting inside the gazebo sheltering from the rain and storm

entered.detail: octagonal white wooden gazebo with columns and decorative railings in the garden center
flowering shrubs surrounding the gazebo base
main house visible again in the background through the rain

segments.scene_description: A thunderstorm hits the plantation, dramatically darkening the sky and bringing rain. The camera approaches a white gazebo where people are sheltering, surrounded by garden bushes. The main house is visible in the distant background through the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a manicured plantation estate that transforms from a bright morning into a dramatic thunderstorm. It begins in a garden beside a large flower urn, moving forward as the plantation house comes into view and two men begin walking along a brick path. As the camera follows the path along the side of the house, it passes green shutters and wooden barrels before the scene opens up into grassy grounds circling a wooden outbuilding. The sky then darkens as a storm approaches, shifting the landscape toward fields bordered by split-rail fences and a distant tree line. Finally, a thunderstorm hits with heavy rain and a darkened sky, leading the camera toward a white gazebo where people shelter while the main house remains visible in the distant background.
